basics.name: Shalini Kumari
basics.title: Computer Science Undergraduate | Web Development | Open Source Contributor | DSA Learner | Aspiring Software Developer
basics.summary: As a Computer Science undergraduate with a strong passion for software development, I possess hands-on experience in C++ and a solid understanding of web technologies. I am dedicated to continuous learning and actively engage in practicing data structures and algorithms to enhance my problem-solving skills. I thrive on transforming innovative ideas into functional projects, demonstrating my ability to apply theoretical knowledge in practical settings. My goal is to grow into a proficient software professional while contributing effectively to team projects and initiatives. Interested in research-driven software development, distributed systems, and AI-powered applications.

experience.company: AWS Cloud Club Gautam Buddha University
bullets: Core Team Web Developer at AWS Cloud Club, contributing to web development initiatives, supporting technical events, and collaborating on cloud-focused community projects.
Contributed to feature enhancements and bug fixes in collaborative open-source projects.
Refactored code to improve modularity and maintainability.
Followed Git workflow including branching, pull requests, and issue tracking.
Enhanced backend logic and improved code quality through structured Git workflows.
Contributed to open-source projects, enhancing backend logic and improving code quality through structured Git workflows.
Active contributor to community-driven coding projects.
Served as a GWY Pre-Conf Ambassador for GWYConf’26, contributing to community engagement, outreach, and event promotion while strengthening leadership and communication skills.
Campus Ambassador for BECon’26, eDC IIT Delhi. Promoted events, boosted engagement, and ranked among top ambassadors.
Write content for the project to make an impact in the society✨

achievements.title: CGPA > 9
achievements.context: Maintained high academic performance in Bachelor of Technology (Computer Science).

achievements.title: Top Ambassador Rank
achievements.context: Ranked among top ambassadors for BECon'26 at eDC IIT Delhi.

achievements.title: Open Source Impact
achievements.context: Actively contributing to multiple open-source communities including AWS Cloud Club and Open Source Connect.

projects.title: RFID Security System
bullets: Developed an RFID-based access control system using Arduino and RFID module.
Implemented user authentication and real-time access indication using LEDs/buzzer.

projects.title: QR-Attendance-System
bullets: Designed a QR-based attendance system to automate student attendance.
Used QR scanning logic to store and verify attendance records efficiently.

projects.title: Expense Tracker
bullets: Developed a web application to track and manage daily expenses.

certifications: Deloitte Australia - Data Analytics Job Simulation
